channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 9 missing after Washington paper mill tank implosion and officials say there’s no hope of survivors
item.description: Authorities say a second person has died from injuries suffered when a chemical tank ruptured at a Washington state paper mill, raising the presumed death toll to 11.

item.title: ICE detainees are dying by suicide at an ‘alarming’ rate, an AP investigation finds
Millions of people have been placed in new voting districts. Here’s where the redistricting stands
